MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $297.61 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE NOV-04-2025,, (TRANSACTION ID # 77314185) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING AND CONSISTENT WITH THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AS SUCH: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SHALL RECOVER $4,239.43 IN PRINCIPAL, AND $297.61 IN COSTS, FOR A TOTAL OF $4,537.04. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGN.(SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABDUL, MOHAMMAD AKA MOHAMMAD S ABDUL ABDUL, MOHAMMAD S $4,239.43 PRINCIPAL, $297.61 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,537.04, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 6646
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff American Express National Bank Motion to Enter Judgment Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 664.6 is granted.

Good cause appearing and consistent with the parties' agreement and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, judgment shall be entered as such: Plaintiff American Express National Bank shall recover $4,239.43 in principal, and $297.61 in costs, for a total of $4,537.04.

Order and Judgment sign.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-29-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-13-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-16-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
